channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Alibaba previews 2.4-trillion-parameter Qwen3.8 ahead of open-weight release
item.description: Alibaba claims the model ranks second behind Fable 5.
item.content:encoded:
Alibaba claims the model ranks second behind Fable 5.

Original source: https://www.qwencloud.com/pricing/token-plan

item.title: Dean Ball proposes backdoor warnings to deter Chinese open-weight AI
item.description: Tech leaders criticized the plan as weaponizing regulatory uncertainty.
item.content:encoded:
Tech leaders criticized the plan as weaponizing regulatory uncertainty.

item.title: Kimi.ai pauses K3 subscriptions due to GPU capacity limits
item.description: It will split memberships into general and coding tiers.
item.content:encoded:
It will split memberships into general and coding tiers.

Original source: https://x.com/Kimi_Moonshot/status/2078855608565207130

item.title: Kimi K3 fixes 15 vulnerabilities that US AI guardrails blocked
item.content:encoded:
The 10-hour debugging run cost just $250.

Original source: https://www.thenews.com.pk/latest/1409646-chinas-kimi-k3-fixes-15-security-bugs-challenging-us-ai-guardrails-report

item.title: Alibaba reposts claim that China mandated open-sourcing Qwen
item.description: Observers view the repost as admitting state pressure.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Trial lawyers lobby against autonomous vehicles to protect litigation revenues
item.description: Auto accidents generate $220 billion in annual insurance payouts.
item.content:encoded:
Auto accidents generate $220 billion in annual insurance payouts.

Original source: https://marginalrevolution.com/marginalrevolution/2026/07/trial-lawyers-lobby-against-autonomous-vehicles.html

  • Replies: 435
  • Posts: 7

item.title: David Sacks accuses OpenAI and Anthropic of seeking regulatory capture
item.description: He claims they use informal warnings against Chinese open-weight models
item.content:encoded:
He claims they use informal warnings against Chinese open-weight models

Original source: https://www.cnbc.com/2025/10/19/anthropic-tries-to-keep-pace-with-openai-faces-off-with-david-sacks.html

item.title: SpaceX reportedly orders 13,000 Nvidia GB300 server racks from Foxconn
item.description: Each server rack costs an estimated $4 million.
item.content:encoded:
Each server rack costs an estimated $4 million.

item.title: Paul Graham claims trial lawyers oppose autonomous vehicles to protect profits
item.description: Elon Musk agreed, calling the legal opposition terrible.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Conviction's Sarah Guo bets on specialized AI over frontier labs
item.description: Her early portfolio is valued at over $76 billion.
item.content:encoded:
Her early portfolio is valued at over $76 billion.
